title: aegiphila glabrata f. macrophylla
intro: Aegiphila glabrata f. macrophylla is a plant species of the Aegiphila genus, commonly known as a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and reducing fever. Aegiphila glabrata f. macrophylla is typically prepared as a decoction, infused tea, or in the form of a tincture for its medicinal uses.
